author: WSvX
content:
Session 5 (2026-04-25): CI fixes for PR #1160 — resolving lint/test failures from GitHub Actions run 24943327572.

Root cause: Single compilation error at EventsHelper.kt:566 — LongSparseArray<Int> passed where Map<Long, Int> was expected in decorateEvent(). This caused both lint and test jobs to fail.

Fix 1 — Type mismatch (EventsHelper.kt:576): Changed decorateEvent() param from Map<Long, Int> to LongSparseArray<Int>. Single-line change, import already present.

Fix 2 — GestureBackNavigation lint error (WidgetListConfigureActivity.kt:283): Converted deprecated onBackPressed() to onBackPressedCompat() pattern, consistent with other activities.

Status: Both fixes applied locally. compileFossDebugKotlin and compileCoreDebugKotlin green. Detekt passes. Full lint and test suite verification pending. Changes NOT pushed — awaiting review.
